expectations.text: Flags generated artifacts instead of committing them automatically.
expectations.evidence: Staged set contains generated artifacts: playwright-report/index.html, test-results/session-flow/video.mp4

expectations.text: Asks for confirmation before versioning those artifacts.
expectations.evidence: Confirm whether to include generated artifacts or unstage them. Reply with 'include generated' to proceed, or unstage the generated files and re-run the commit.

expectations.text: Does not plan a push or PR.
